[-1 PC Ground] / [0 PC Air]

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; combos naturally to 5MP; Stance Cancel: -1/-8; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame
cells.html: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; combos naturally to 5MP; Stance Cancel: -1/-8; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: Good combo/frame trap starter; Stance Cancel: +3/-1; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame
cells.html: Good combo/frame trap starter; Stance Cancel: +3/-1; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame

cells.text: Great long-ranged poke and whiff punish tool; cancelable into Stance and can input follow-ups after 16f; combos naturally to Stance LP if close enough, or stance MK/HK on Punish Counter; Stance Cancel: +6/+1 into follow-up, -4/-9 into blocking
cells.html: Great long-ranged poke and whiff punish tool; cancelable into Stance and can input follow-ups after 16f; combos naturally to Stance LP if close enough, or stance MK/HK on Punish Counter; Stance Cancel: +6/+1 into follow-up, -4/-9 into blocking

cells.text: Stance Cancel: 0/-3; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame
cells.html: Stance Cancel: 0/-3; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: Cannot hit crouching opponents; good anti-air (cannot hit cross-up); Stance Cancel: +9/+4
cells.html: Cannot hit crouching opponents; good anti-air (cannot hit cross-up); Stance Cancel: +9/+4

cells.text: Cannot hit crouching opponents; slow but rewarding mid-range anti-air (leg/head are invulnerable to airborne strikes 14-16f); cannot hit cross-up; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Stance Cancel: +10/+6 into follow-up, -3/-7 into blocking
cells.html: Cannot hit crouching opponents; slow but rewarding mid-range anti-air (leg/head are invulnerable to airborne strikes 14-16f); cannot hit cross-up; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Stance Cancel: +10/+6 into follow-up, -3/-7 into blocking

cells.text: 1f extra recovery on whiff; decent range and hitbox disjoint for a poke; Stance Cancel: +6/+1; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-9 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)
cells.html: 1f extra recovery on whiff; decent range and hitbox disjoint for a poke; Stance Cancel: +6/+1; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-9 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

cells.text: 2 hits (only 2nd is cancelable); forces stand on hit; solid anti-air on frames 12-13 and 21-23 (cannot hit cross-up); 1st hit puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state (2nd hit causes air reset, but can whiff for a knockdown); counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; Stance Cancel: +8/+4 into follow-up, -6/-10 into blocking
cells.html: 2 hits (only 2nd is cancelable); forces stand on hit; solid anti-air on frames 12-13 and 21-23 (cannot hit cross-up); 1st hit puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state (2nd hit causes air reset, but can whiff for a knockdown); counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; Stance Cancel: +8/+4 into follow-up, -6/-10 into blocking

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; fully cancelable (rare for a 2LK); Stance Cancel: -3/-4
cells.html: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; fully cancelable (rare for a 2LK); Stance Cancel: -3/-4

cells.text: Good range for a cancelable low poke; Stance Cancel: +5/+2; Range: 1.477; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames
cells.html: Good range for a cancelable low poke; Stance Cancel: +5/+2; Range: 1.477; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

cells.text: 2f extra recovery on block; more active frames than most sweeps (can be as safe as -4 with meaty timing); puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (can juggle after late anti-air 2HK); Stance Cancel: KD/-11 into follow-up, KD/-21 into blocking
cells.html: 2f extra recovery on block; more active frames than most sweeps (can be as safe as -4 with meaty timing); puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (can juggle after late anti-air 2HK); Stance Cancel: KD/-11 into follow-up, KD/-21 into blocking

cells.text: Fast downward-angled air-to-air; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. Dee Jay/JP/Marisa/Zangief
cells.html: Fast downward-angled air-to-air; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. Dee Jay/JP/Marisa/Zangief

cells.text: 2 hits, can only connect once vs. grounded opponents; both hits put airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels to Air Lightning Legs or Air SA1 from either hit; lower body projectile invuln 7-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: 2 hits, can only connect once vs. grounded opponents; both hits put airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels to Air Lightning Legs or Air SA1 from either hit; lower body projectile invuln 7-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (300 less damage vs. airborne); cancelable into j.HP~j.HP even on whiff; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (300 less damage vs. airborne); cancelable into j.HP~j.HP even on whiff; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 6-20f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 6-20f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. JP/Marisa/Zangief (opponent must be in Burnout for true blockstring); lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking leg (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. JP/Marisa/Zangief (opponent must be in Burnout for true blockstring); lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking leg (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Hits on both sides, preventing the opponent from walking under for a punish; useful air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking legs (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Hits on both sides, preventing the opponent from walking under for a punish; useful air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking legs (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Great poke and neutral buffer tool with a disjointed hitbox and lenient hitconfirm window; Stance Cancel: +5/+1; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames
cells.html: Great poke and neutral buffer tool with a disjointed hitbox and lenient hitconfirm window; Stance Cancel: +5/+1; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

cells.text: Short range combo and frame trap tool; high active frame count makes it amazing as a meaty option; Stance Cancel: +9/+3 into follow-up, -5/-11 into blocking
cells.html: Short range combo and frame trap tool; high active frame count makes it amazing as a meaty option; Stance Cancel: +9/+3 into follow-up, -5/-11 into blocking

cells.text: Stance Cancel: +3/-2 into follow-up, -5/-10 into blocking; 1-8f crouching state; does not allow a follow-up link (except for Punish Counter 3HP into Stance LP); puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state (e.g. after Wallsplat)
cells.html: Stance Cancel: +3/-2 into follow-up, -5/-10 into blocking; 1-8f crouching state; does not allow a follow-up link (except for Punish Counter 3HP into Stance LP); puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state (e.g. after Wallsplat)

cells.text: Punish Counter crumple state can lead to Stance HK launch or Stance LP grounded combo; causes spinning free juggle state on Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; great hitbox priority; Stance Cancel: +2/-1 into follow-up, -6/-9 into blocking; extends a lower-body hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles
cells.html: Punish Counter crumple state can lead to Stance HK launch or Stance LP grounded combo; causes spinning free juggle state on Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; great hitbox priority; Stance Cancel: +2/-1 into follow-up, -6/-9 into blocking; extends a lower-body hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

cells.text: Side-switching overhead; can only hit cross-up (does not work on fully cornered opponents); puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; 1f better hit advantage vs. most crouching characters; has extremely long range when performed out of Drive Rush
cells.html: Side-switching overhead; can only hit cross-up (does not work on fully cornered opponents); puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; 1f better hit advantage vs. most crouching characters; has extremely long range when performed out of Drive Rush

cells.text: Not an overhead, but can hit immediately on the way up to bait throw techs; cancelable into itself on hit/block (up to 3 total uses) or into other air moves; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered); lower body projectile invuln 3f~land (if used immediately on the way up and whiffs, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Not an overhead, but can hit immediately on the way up to bait throw techs; cancelable into itself on hit/block (up to 3 total uses) or into other air moves; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered); lower body projectile invuln 3f~land (if used immediately on the way up and whiffs, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Can be performed on whiff; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state
cells.html: Can be performed on whiff; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state

cells.text: Cancelable into itself on hit/block (up to 3 total uses) or into other air moves; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered)
cells.html: Cancelable into itself on hit/block (up to 3 total uses) or into other air moves; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered)

cells.text: Cancelable into other air moves on hit/block but cannot chain into any further Yoso Kicks; causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered)
cells.html: Cancelable into other air moves on hit/block but cannot chain into any further Yoso Kicks; causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; can hit cross-up (bounces away from wall if opponent is fully cornered)

cells.text: Crouching state 14-22f, then low profiles until exiting stance; follow-ups can be input on frame 15 at the earliest; counter-hit state for entire animation; if no follow-up, stays crouched for 57f (hold crouch to extend); can block while crouching (cannot block overheads, as this leads to Stance Exit); blocking an attack immediately exits stance and allows a Drive Reversal; can take longer to enter stance when canceled from heavy normals, giving much worse frame advantage if a follow-up is not used immediately
cells.html: Crouching state 14-22f, then low profiles until exiting stance; follow-ups can be input on frame 15 at the earliest; counter-hit state for entire animation; if no follow-up, stays crouched for 57f (hold crouch to extend); can block while crouching (cannot block overheads, as this leads to Stance Exit); blocking an attack immediately exits stance and allows a Drive Reversal; can take longer to enter stance when canceled from heavy normals, giving much worse frame advantage if a follow-up is not used immediately

cells.text: Input 214P again to manually exit stance (fastest total Serenity Stream time is 37f); cannot block while exiting stance; counter-hit state for entire animation; final 14f of recovery is in a standing state; 18f version occurs automatically after 14+57f (can delay by holding crouch); when Stance Exit occurs automatically after LP/LK/MK stance attacks, the total exit duration is increased and Chun can stand block before the final 18f recovery period
cells.html: Input 214P again to manually exit stance (fastest total Serenity Stream time is 37f); cannot block while exiting stance; counter-hit state for entire animation; final 14f of recovery is in a standing state; 18f version occurs automatically after 14+57f (can delay by holding crouch); when Stance Exit occurs automatically after LP/LK/MK stance attacks, the total exit duration is increased and Chun can stand block before the final 18f recovery period

cells.text: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; slight low profile for entire move duration; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (2f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 2 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)
cells.html: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; slight low profile for entire move duration; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (2f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 2 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

cells.text: Low profile/upper body projectile invuln: 1-31f (exit stance) / 1-36f (remain crouched); extra-low profile 8-21f (can even go under Drive Impact); [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; () refers to KD Adv. when exiting Serenity Stream on hit; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation (1f worse PP disadvantage if she holds downback); the final active frame does not move forward (can only achieve the highest frame advantage with meaty timing, not with spacing)
cells.html: Low profile/upper body projectile invuln: 1-31f (exit stance) / 1-36f (remain crouched); extra-low profile 8-21f (can even go under Drive Impact); [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; () refers to KD Adv. when exiting Serenity Stream on hit; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation (1f worse PP disadvantage if she holds downback); the final active frame does not move forward (can only achieve the highest frame advantage with meaty timing, not with spacing)

cells.text: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; exits Serenity Stream upon use; only first hit is an overhead; 1-2f low profile, 1-5f crouching state; 29-42f no head hurtbox
cells.html: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; exits Serenity Stream upon use; only first hit is an overhead; 1-2f low profile, 1-5f crouching state; 29-42f no head hurtbox

cells.text: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (5f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 5 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)
cells.html: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (5f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 5 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

cells.text: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (6f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 6 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)
cells.html: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (6f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 6 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

cells.text: Jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; exits Serenity Stream upon use; 1-6f crouching state
cells.html: Jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; exits Serenity Stream upon use; 1-6f crouching state

cells.text: Has large pushback during throw animation, preventing corner throw loops (with frame-perfect timing, can throw loop vs. Blanka, E. Honda, and Zangief); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: Has large pushback during throw animation, preventing corner throw loops (with frame-perfect timing, can throw loop vs. Blanka, E. Honda, and Zangief); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: Side switches; in the corner, does not allow true strike/throw oki without Drive Rush; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: Side switches; in the corner, does not allow true strike/throw oki without Drive Rush; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: Throw height doesn't affect KD advantage, but higher connect will throw opponent farther; no throw oki but can use a ranged meaty strike against cornered opponent
cells.html: Throw height doesn't affect KD advantage, but higher connect will throw opponent farther; no throw oki but can use a ranged meaty strike against cornered opponent

cells.text: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.
cells.html: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.

cells.text: 2 hits; performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 7f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; if 1st hit is Perfect Parried, opponent can interrupt with a move 11f or faster; see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: 2 hits; performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 7f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; if 1st hit is Perfect Parried, opponent can interrupt with a move 11f or faster; see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: 2 hits; performed by inputting 6HPHK on wakeup; 7f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); if 1st hit is Perfect Parried, opponent can interrupt with a move 11f or faster; see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: 2 hits; performed by inputting 6HPHK on wakeup; 7f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); if 1st hit is Perfect Parried, opponent can interrupt with a move 11f or faster; see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.
cells.html: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 1.044 (min/throw), 2.222 (min/block), 3.163 (max/final DR frame)
cells.html: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 1.044 (min/throw), 2.222 (min/block), 3.163 (max/final DR frame)

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties
cells.html: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties

cells.text: Counter-hit state during entire duration; can be done from Back or Neutral jump if fully against the wall, or after Forward Jump against a cornered opponent
cells.html: Counter-hit state during entire duration; can be done from Back or Neutral jump if fully against the wall, or after Forward Jump against a cornered opponent

cells.text: 50f charge (charge lasts 10f after releasing back direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; travels ~90% screen; Super cancel timing is very strict
cells.html: 50f charge (charge lasts 10f after releasing back direction); no charge required if canceled from Stance normals; travels ~90% screen; Super cancel timing is very strict

cells.text: 3 hits; Counter-hit bonus advantage carries through all hits; Punish Counter knockdown puts opponent into a free juggle state (can air reset with a 4f normal in the corner); useful as a 5f punish starter (similar to a shoto 5LK in terms of range); cannot hit cross-up

cells.text: 4 hits; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage carries over through all hits; cannot hit cross-up
cells.html: 4 hits; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage carries over through all hits; cannot hit cross-up

cells.text: 5 hits; puts opponents into limited juggle state; can juggle into 22K in the corner or SA1/SA3 anywhere (optimal for SA3 damage, skipping the additional damage scaling when canceled); cannot hit cross-up

cells.text: 5 hits; can follow-up with KK on hit/block for no extra Drive cost; Counter-hit bonus advantage carries over through all hits; cannot hit cross-up; Punish Counter crumple state gives 11 frames to link a grounded hit, then an additional 23 frames to land a juggle before the opponent is knocked down; airborne Punish Counter puts the opponent into a spinning free juggle state
